---
title: "NSCLC_Medication_Timeline"
author: "Dipankor Dhrubo"
date: "2025-10-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(umap)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(factoextra)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(forcats)
```

```{r}
# Loading the metadata

NSCLC_metadata<- read_rds("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/NSCLC_metadata.rds")

# A more fine tuning to make sure we are only using those samples that are directly coming from the lung tumor specimen

Specimen<- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_ClinicalMolLinkage_V4.csv"),
                          read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_ClinicalMolLinkage_V4.csv")) %>%
  select(RNASeq,SpecimenSiteOfCollection) %>% filter(RNASeq %in% NSCLC_metadata$sample)

lung_keywords <- c("lung", "Lung", "bronchus", "Bronchus", "trachea", "Trachea")

# Keep rows where Specimen_site contains any of the lung-related keywords
lung_sites <- Specimen %>%
  filter(grepl(paste(lung_keywords, collapse = "|"), SpecimenSiteOfCollection, ignore.case = TRUE)) %>% pull(RNASeq)

NSCLC_metadata <- NSCLC_metadata %>% filter(sample %in% lung_sites) %>% unique()


```

```{r}
###### Reordering Treatment 


#### Categorizing drugs

Medication<- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_Medications_V4.csv"),
                          read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_Medications_V4.csv")) %>%
  select(AvatarKey,Medication,MedLineRegimen,AgeAtMedStart,AgeAtMedStop) %>% filter(AvatarKey %in% NSCLC_metadata$AvatarKey)

Drug_annotation<- readxl::read_xlsx("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/ORIEN_Medication_List_v2_20240503.xlsx") %>%
  select(-1)


drug_map <- Drug_annotation %>%
  mutate(treatment_group = case_when(
    Immunotherapy == "yes" ~ "IO",
    Chemotherapy == "yes" ~ "Chemo",
    `Small Molecule` == "yes" ~ "Small_Molecule",
    `Hormone Therapy` == "yes" ~ "Hormone",
    Targeted == "yes" ~ "Targeted",
    Ancillary == "yes" ~ "Ancillary",
    `Radioactive Isotope` == "yes" ~ "Radio_Iso",
    Oncologic == "yes" ~ "Onco_drug",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )) %>%
  select(Medication, treatment_group) %>%
  dplyr::rename(drug_name = Medication)

colnames(drug_map)[1]<- "Medication"

```


```{r}

### Incorporating Age at diagnosis

Diagnosis <- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_Diagnosis_V4.csv"),
                          read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_Diagnosis_V4.csv")) %>% 
  filter(AvatarKey %in% NSCLC_metadata$AvatarKey) %>% select(AvatarKey,AgeAtDiagnosis) %>% 
  filter(! AgeAtDiagnosis == "Unknown/Not Applicable") %>%
  filter(! AgeAtDiagnosis == "Age Unknown/Not Recorded") %>%
  mutate(AgeAtDiagnosis = ifelse(grepl("Age 90 or older", AgeAtDiagnosis), "90", AgeAtDiagnosis))

### Taking the latest diagnostic time

Diagnosis <- Diagnosis %>%
  group_by(AvatarKey) %>%
  arrange(AgeAtDiagnosis) %>%  # Ensure it's sorted by age
  slice_max(order_by = AgeAtDiagnosis, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%  # Keep the first diagnosis
  ungroup()

### Incorporating Radiation Start and end time 
Radiation <- bind_rows(read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2023_11_30/Clinical_Data/20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20230620_Radiation_V4.csv"),
                          read.csv("/fs/ess/PDE0023/microbiomeRIG/2024_05_01//20PRJ060OSU_NormalizedFiles/20PRJ060OSU_20240221_Radiation_V4.csv")) %>% 
  filter(AvatarKey %in% NSCLC_metadata$AvatarKey) %>% select(AvatarKey, AgeAtRadiationStart,AgeAtRadiationStop) %>% mutate(AgeAtRadiationStart = as.numeric(AgeAtRadiationStart),
       AgeAtRadiationStop = as.numeric(AgeAtRadiationStop)) %>%
  group_by(AvatarKey) %>%
  arrange(AgeAtRadiationStart) %>%  # Ensure it's sorted by age
  slice_max(order_by = AgeAtRadiationStart, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%  # Keep the first diagnosis
  ungroup()


Time_status<- NSCLC_metadata %>% left_join(Diagnosis, by="AvatarKey") %>%
  left_join(Radiation, by="AvatarKey") %>%
  select(sample, 
         AvatarKey,
         diagsurvtime,
         status, 
         AgeAtDiagnosis, 
         RadiationTherapyInd,
         AgeAtRadiationStart, 
         AgeAtRadiationStop)


###  Some joining of files to make proper medication file.

med_annotated <- Medication %>%
  left_join(drug_map, by = "Medication")

med_annotated<- Time_status %>% left_join(med_annotated,by="AvatarKey")

med_annotated<- med_annotated %>% select(sample, AvatarKey,AgeAtDiagnosis,
                                         diagsurvtime,status, Medication,
                                         treatment_group,AgeAtMedStart, 
                                         AgeAtMedStop, RadiationTherapyInd,
                                         AgeAtRadiationStart, 
                                         AgeAtRadiationStop)

med_annotated<- med_annotated %>% mutate(
  AgeAtMedStart = as.numeric(AgeAtMedStart),
  AgeAtMedStop = as.numeric(AgeAtMedStop)
)


### more fine tuning the meidcation file

df <- med_annotated %>%
  # Clean up: drop NA start dates and standardize
  filter(!is.na(AgeAtMedStart), !is.na(AgeAtMedStop)) %>%
  
  # Apply truncation logic
  mutate(AgeAtDiagnosis= as.numeric(AgeAtDiagnosis),
    AgeAtTreatmentStart.mod = if_else(
    AgeAtDiagnosis > AgeAtMedStart,
    AgeAtDiagnosis,
    AgeAtMedStart
  )) %>%
  
  # Remove invalid treatments (where end is before start)
  filter(AgeAtMedStop > AgeAtTreatmentStart.mod) %>%
  select(-AgeAtRadiationStart,-AgeAtRadiationStop,-RadiationTherapyInd)


# Step 1: Build radiation_df with only the valid radiation entries
radiation_df <- Time_status %>%
  filter(RadiationTherapyInd == "Yes") %>%
  transmute(
    sample = sample,
    AvatarKey = AvatarKey,
    AgeAtDiagnosis = as.numeric(AgeAtDiagnosis),
    diagsurvtime = diagsurvtime,
    status = status,
    Medication = "Radiation",
    treatment_group = "Radiation",
    AgeAtMedStart = as.numeric(AgeAtRadiationStart),
    AgeAtMedStop = as.numeric(AgeAtRadiationStop)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    AgeAtTreatmentStart.mod = if_else(AgeAtDiagnosis > AgeAtMedStart,
                                      AgeAtDiagnosis,
                                      AgeAtMedStart)
  ) %>%
  filter(AgeAtMedStop > AgeAtTreatmentStart.mod)

## Combining the medication and radiation file

df_combined <- bind_rows(df, radiation_df) %>% unique()


write_rds(df_combined,"/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Medication_NSCLCORIEN.rds")

```


```{r}

### Normalizing the medication file

df_combined <- read_rds("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Medication_NSCLCORIEN.rds")

# Define timeline bounds (can use min/max from dataset or per-patient)
min_age <- floor(min(df_combined$AgeAtDiagnosis, na.rm = TRUE))
max_age <- ceiling(max(df_combined$AgeAtMedStop, na.rm = TRUE))

# Create 6-month intervals
intervals <- seq(min_age, max_age, by = 0.5)

# Get unique patient IDs
timeline <- data.frame(SL_ID = unique(df_combined$sample))

# Loop through 6-month bins and record treatments
for (i in seq_along(intervals[-length(intervals)])) {
  start_bin <- intervals[i]
  end_bin <- intervals[i + 1]
  bin_label <- paste0("Period_", i, "_Age_", start_bin, "_", end_bin)
  
  timeline[[bin_label]] <- sapply(timeline$SL_ID, function(pid) {
    patient_rows <- df_combined %>% filter(sample == pid)
    
    overlap_rows <- patient_rows %>%
      filter(AgeAtTreatmentStart.mod < end_bin & AgeAtMedStop >= start_bin)
    
    if (nrow(overlap_rows) == 0) return(NA)
    
    # Annotate as "Drug (Type)"
    treatments <- paste0(overlap_rows$Medication, " (", overlap_rows$treatment_group, ")")
    
    return(paste(treatments, collapse = "; "))
  })
}

colnames(timeline)[-1] <- gsub("^Period_\\d+_", "", colnames(timeline)[-1])

timeline_long <- timeline %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -SL_ID,
    names_to = "TimeBin",
    values_to = "Treatment"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Treatment))


## Compiling the treatment group 

timeline_long <- timeline_long %>%
  mutate(TreatmentType = case_when(
    str_detect(Treatment, "Chemo") & str_detect(Treatment, "IO") & str_detect(Treatment, "Radiation") & str_detect(Treatment, "Small_Molecule") ~ "Chemo + IO + Radiation + Small Molecule",
    str_detect(Treatment, "Chemo") & str_detect(Treatment, "IO") & str_detect(Treatment, "Radiation") ~ "Chemo + IO + Radiation",
    str_detect(Treatment, "Chemo") & str_detect(Treatment, "IO") & str_detect(Treatment, "Small_Molecule") ~ "Chemo + IO + Small Molecule",
    str_detect(Treatment, "Chemo") & str_detect(Treatment, "Radiation") & str_detect(Treatment, "Small_Molecule") ~ "Chemo + Radiation + Small Molecule",
    str_detect(Treatment, "IO") & str_detect(Treatment, "Radiation") & str_detect(Treatment, "Small_Molecule") ~ "IO + Radiation + Small Molecule",
    str_detect(Treatment, "Chemo") & str_detect(Treatment, "Small_Molecule") ~ "Chemo + Small Molecule",
    str_detect(Treatment, "IO") & str_detect(Treatment, "Small_Molecule") ~ "IO + Small Molecule",
    str_detect(Treatment, "Radiation") & str_detect(Treatment, "Small_Molecule") ~ "Radiation + Small Molecule",
    str_detect(Treatment, "Chemo") & str_detect(Treatment, "IO") ~ "Chemo + IO",
    str_detect(Treatment, "Chemo") & str_detect(Treatment, "Radiation") ~ "Chemo + Radiation",
    str_detect(Treatment, "IO") & str_detect(Treatment, "Radiation") ~ "IO + Radiation",
    str_detect(Treatment, "Chemo") ~ "Chemo only",
    str_detect(Treatment, "IO") ~ "IO only",
    str_detect(Treatment, "Radiation") ~ "Radiation only",
    str_detect(Treatment, "Small_Molecule") ~ "Small Molecule only",
    TRUE ~ "Other/Ancillary"
  ))



# First, extract age from TimeBin (e.g., "Age_65_65.5" -> 65)
timeline_long <- timeline_long %>%
  mutate(AgeStart = as.numeric(str_extract(TimeBin, "(?<=Age_)\\d+\\.?\\d*")))

# Sort patients by minimum treatment start age
ordered_patients <- timeline_long %>%
  group_by(SL_ID) %>%
  summarise(MinAge = min(AgeStart, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(MinAge) %>%
  pull(SL_ID)

# Relevel SL_ID for plotting
timeline_long$SL_ID <- factor(timeline_long$SL_ID, levels = ordered_patients)


```


```{r}

### Some miscellenious steps

df_combined<- df_combined %>% mutate(age_at_death_progression = AgeAtDiagnosis + diagsurvtime)

# Merge with timeline_long if needed
timeline_long_2 <- timeline_long %>% 
  left_join(df_combined %>% select(sample, status, age_at_death_progression), by = "sample") %>%
  unique()


# STEP 1: Clean original medication + radiation data
df_clean <- df_combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(AgeAtMedStart), !is.na(AgeAtMedStop)) %>%
  mutate(AgeAtTreatmentStart.mod = if_else(
    AgeAtDiagnosis > AgeAtMedStart,
    AgeAtDiagnosis,
    AgeAtMedStart
  )) %>%
  filter(AgeAtMedStop > AgeAtTreatmentStart.mod)

# STEP 2: Create 1-month bins
min_age <- floor(min(df_clean$AgeAtDiagnosis, na.rm = TRUE) * 12) / 12
max_age <- ceiling(max(df_clean$AgeAtMedStop, na.rm = TRUE) * 12) / 12
intervals <- seq(min_age, max_age, by = 1/12)


expanded_timeline <- df_clean %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    month_seq = list(seq(AgeAtTreatmentStart.mod, AgeAtMedStop, by = 1/12))
  ) %>%
  unnest(month_seq) %>%
  mutate(month_seq = round(month_seq, 3)) %>%
  distinct(sample, treatment_group, month_seq)

# STEP 4: Create patient-month-treatment matrix
timeline_long_monthly <- expanded_timeline %>%
  dplyr::rename(AgeMonth = month_seq) %>%
  select(sample, AgeMonth, treatment_group)

# STEP 5: Normalize start time (set first treatment to time 0)
start_age_per_patient <- timeline_long_monthly %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(start_age = min(AgeMonth, na.rm = TRUE))

timeline_long_norm <- timeline_long_monthly %>%
  left_join(start_age_per_patient, by = "sample") %>%
  mutate(TimeSinceTreatmentStart = AgeMonth - start_age)

timeline_long_norm <- timeline_long_norm %>%
  mutate(TimeSinceTreatmentStart = round(TimeSinceTreatmentStart * 12) / 12)  # round to nearest month


timeline_long_norm<- timeline_long_norm %>% left_join(NSCLC_metadata %>% 
                                                        select(sample,Stage,status), by="sample")


timeline_long_norm<- timeline_long_norm %>% left_join(timeline_long_2 %>% 
                                                        select(sample, age_at_death_progression), by="sample") %>%
  unique()


timeline_long_norm$sample <- factor(timeline_long_norm$sample, levels = unique(timeline_long_norm$sample))



ggplot(timeline_long_norm %>% 
         filter(!Stage== "Unknown") %>% filter(!Stage== 0), aes(x = TimeSinceTreatmentStart, y = sample, fill = treatment_group)) +
  geom_tile(height = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "Time Since First Treatment (Years)", y = "Patient", fill = "Treatment Type") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 15, by = 1)) +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~Stage)+
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Timeline_stage_permonth.png", width = 18, height = 20)

## Saving the file for future work

write_csv(timeline_long_norm,
          "/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/NSCLCORIEN_Treatment_simplified_longformat_data.csv")

```

```{r}
## Radiation only timeline

Radiation_patients<- timeline_long_norm %>% filter(treatment_group == "Radiation") %>% pull(sample)
Radiation_patients_timeline<- timeline_long_norm %>% filter(sample %in% Radiation_patients)


ggplot(Radiation_patients_timeline, aes(x = TimeSinceTreatmentStart, y = sample, fill = treatment_group)) +
  geom_tile(height = 0.9) +
  labs(x = "Time Since First Treatment (Years)", y = "Patient", fill = "Treatment Type") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 15, by = 1)) +  # Change 15 to your max time
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5,vjust = .9, size = 20),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Radiation_patients_only_Timeline.png", width = 18, height = 20)

```



```{r}


# Build contiguous month-level segments from a long treatment table
# Expects columns:
#   sample (id), TimeSinceTreatmentStart (years), treatment_group (string)
# Returns:
#   sample, type, block, m_start, m_end, start_year, end_year
build_segs_from_long_months <- function(
  df,
  id_col   = "sample",
  time_col = "TimeSinceTreatmentStart",
  type_col = "treatment_group",
  drop_types   = c("None", NA),
  valid_types  = c("Radiation","Chemo","IO","Hormone","Targeted",
                   "Small_Molecule","Ancillary","Other")
){
  stopifnot(all(c(id_col, time_col, type_col) %in% names(df)))

  # 1) Basic clean + month index
  dat <- df %>%
    transmute(
      sample = .data[[id_col]],
      t_year = as.numeric(.data[[time_col]]),
      type_raw = as.character(.data[[type_col]])
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(sample), !is.na(t_year), !is.na(type_raw)) %>%
    filter(!(type_raw %in% drop_types)) %>%
    # robust month index (handles 0.083333…)
    mutate(m = floor(t_year * 12 + 1e-6))

  if (!nrow(dat)) {
    return(tibble(sample=character(), type=factor(), block=integer(),
                  m_start=integer(), m_end=integer(),
                  start_year=double(), end_year=double()))
  }

  # 2) Canonicalize treatment labels to your house style (light touch)
  canon <- function(x){
    x <- trimws(x)
    x <- str_replace_all(x, " ", "_")
    x <- str_replace_all(x, "-", "_")
    # harmonize a few common variants
    x <- case_when(
      str_detect(x, regex("radiation|rt|xrt|imrt|sbrt|radiother", TRUE)) ~ "Radiation",
      str_detect(x, regex("\\bio\\b|immuno|pembro|nivol|atezo|ipi|pd[- ]?1|pd[- ]?l1|ctla", TRUE)) ~ "IO",
      str_detect(x, regex("chemo|chemotherapy|platin|taxel|5fu|gemcitabine|doxo", TRUE)) ~ "Chemo",
      str_detect(x, regex("target|tki|inhibitor|egfr|alk|braf|mek|parp|her2|trast", TRUE)) ~ "Targeted",
      str_detect(x, regex("hormone|endocrine|androgen|estrogen|tamox|abiraterone|enzalu|aromatase|letro|anastro|fulves", TRUE)) ~ "Hormone",
      str_detect(x, regex("small[ _-]?molecule|onco.?drug|oncodrug", TRUE)) ~ "Small_Molecule",
      TRUE ~ x
    )
    x
  }

  dat <- dat %>% mutate(type = canon(type_raw))

  # 3) Collapse per (sample, month) to a SINGLE label.
  #    If multiple types present in that month, create a combo like "Chemo+Radiation".
  month_label <- dat %>%
    group_by(sample, m) %>%
    summarise(
      # restrict to known/allowed labels; unknowns -> "Other"
      types = {
        lab <- unique(type)
        lab[!lab %in% valid_types] <- "Other"
        # order by your preferred display order, then collapse with '+'
        lab <- factor(lab, levels = valid_types)
        paste(sort(as.character(lab)), collapse = "+")
      },
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(types = if_else(types == "", "Other", types))

  # 4) Build contiguous runs (same label, consecutive months)
  segs <- month_label %>%
    arrange(sample, m) %>%
    group_by(sample) %>%
    mutate(
      new_block = (m != lag(m, default = first(m)) + 1L) |
                  (types != lag(types, default = first(types))),
      block = cumsum(replace_na(new_block, TRUE))
    ) %>%
    group_by(sample, block, types) %>%
    summarise(
      m_start = min(m),
      m_end   = max(m) + 1L,            # end is exclusive
      .groups = "drop_last"
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      start_year = m_start / 12,
      end_year   = m_end   / 12,
      type       = fct_inorder(types)
    ) %>%
    select(sample, type, block, m_start, m_end, start_year, end_year) %>%
    arrange(sample, block)

  segs
}


segs <- build_segs_from_long_months(timeline_long_norm,
                                    id_col   = "sample",
                                    time_col = "TimeSinceTreatmentStart",
                                    type_col = "treatment_group")

head(segs)


```


```{r}

## Ordering treatment timeline and plotting the figures

# ---- canonical colors (subset will be used automatically) ----
tx_cols <- c(
  Radiation      = "#8B6BB7",
  Chemo          = "#F28E2B",
  IO             = "#59A14F",
  Hormone        = "#E15759",
  Targeted       = "#4E79A7",
  Small_Molecule = "#76B7B2",
  Ancillary      = "#E1BE6A",  # mustard
  Other          = "#7E6148",  # brown
  None           = "#C0C0C0"   # neutral light gray
)

# ---- map raw labels -> canonical types and clip to horizon ----
prep_segs <- function(segs, horizon_years = 5, catch_all = "Other") {
  segs %>%
    mutate(type_raw = as.character(type)) %>%
    mutate(
      type = case_when(
        str_detect(type_raw, regex("radiation|\\brt\\b|xrt|imrt|sbrt|radiother", TRUE)) ~ "Radiation",
        str_detect(type_raw, regex("\\bio\\b|immuno|pembro|nivol|atezo|ipi|pd-1|pd-l1|ctla", TRUE)) ~ "IO",
        str_detect(type_raw, regex("chemo|chemotherapy|platin|taxel|5fu|gemcitabine|doxo", TRUE)) ~ "Chemo",
        str_detect(type_raw, regex("hormone|endocrine|androgen|estrogen|tamox|abiraterone|enzalu|aromatase|letro|anastro|fulves", TRUE)) ~ "Hormone",
        str_detect(type_raw, regex("target|tki|inhibitor|egfr|alk|braf|mek|parp|her2|trast", TRUE)) ~ "Targeted",
        str_detect(type_raw, regex("small[ _-]?molecule|onco.?drug|oncodrug", TRUE)) ~ "Small_Molecule",
        str_detect(type_raw, regex("ancillary|support|palliat", TRUE)) ~ "Ancillary",
        TRUE ~ catch_all
      ),
      t0 = pmax(0, pmin(start_year, horizon_years)),
      t1 = pmax(0, pmin(end_year,   horizon_years))
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(sample), t1 > t0)
}

# ---- compute row order for ALL patients ----
dominant_order <- function(segs_clip, treatment_order) {
  per_type <- segs_clip %>%
    group_by(sample, type) %>%
    summarise(dur = sum(t1 - t0), .groups = "drop")
  
  totals <- per_type %>%
    group_by(sample) %>%
    summarise(total = sum(dur), .groups = "drop")
  
  # dominant type + share
  dom <- per_type %>%
    group_by(sample) %>%
    slice_max(dur, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    left_join(totals, by = "sample") %>%
    transmute(sample,
              dom_type  = type,
              dom_share = if_else(total > 0, dur / total, 0))
  
  # earliest start for dominant type
  earliest_dom <- segs_clip %>%
    group_by(sample, type) %>%
    summarise(earliest = min(t0), .groups = "drop") %>%
    inner_join(dom, by = c("sample", "type" = "dom_type"))
  
  dom %>%
    left_join(earliest_dom %>% select(sample, earliest), by = "sample") %>%
    mutate(
      dom_type = fct_relevel(factor(dom_type), treatment_order),
      ord1 = as.integer(dom_type),
      ord2 = -dom_share,
      ord3 = earliest
    ) %>%
    arrange(ord1, ord2, ord3) %>%
    transmute(
      sample,
      sample_factor = factor(sample, levels = rev(sample)),  # top row = first
      dom_type = fct_drop(dom_type),
      dom_share,
      earliest
    )
}

# ---- PLOT: all patients, no clustering ----
plot_all_timeline <- function(
    segs,
    horizon_years = 5,
    treatment_order = c("Radiation","Chemo","IO","Hormone",
                        "Targeted","Small_Molecule","Ancillary","Other","None"),
    catch_all = "Other",
    line_width = 0.9,
    # --- NEW styling knobs ---
    base_size = 16,
    title_size = 22,
    axis_title_size = 14,
    axis_text_size = 12,
    legend_title_size = 14,
    legend_text_size = 12,
    bold = TRUE
) {
  segs_clip <- prep_segs(segs, horizon_years = horizon_years, catch_all = catch_all)
  
  # only keep types that exist
  present_types   <- sort(unique(segs_clip$type))
  treatment_order <- intersect(treatment_order, present_types)
  
  # compute ordering
  ord <- dominant_order(segs_clip, treatment_order)
  
  plot_df <- segs_clip %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(ord %>% dplyr::select(sample, sample_factor), by = "sample") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(type = factor(type, levels = treatment_order))
  
  pal <- tx_cols[treatment_order]
  
  ggplot(plot_df) +
    geom_segment(
      aes(x = t0, xend = t1, y = sample_factor, yend = sample_factor, colour = type),
      linewidth = line_width, lineend = "butt"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = pal, breaks = treatment_order, limits = treatment_order,
                       drop = FALSE, name = "Treatment Type") +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, horizon_years), breaks = 0:horizon_years,
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.01))) +
    labs(title = "Treatment Timeline — Ordered by types",
         x = "Time Since First Treatment (years)", y = "Patient") +
    theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
      legend.position    = "right",
      axis.text.y        = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y       = element_blank(),
      # ---- NEW bold + sizes ----
      text          = element_text(face = if (bold) "bold" else "plain"),
      plot.title    = element_text(size = title_size, face = if (bold) "bold" else "plain", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title    = element_text(size = axis_title_size, face = if (bold) "bold" else "plain"),
      axis.text     = element_text(size = axis_text_size, face = if (bold) "bold" else "plain"),
      legend.title  = element_text(size = legend_title_size, face = if (bold) "bold" else "plain"),
      legend.text   = element_text(size = legend_text_size,  face = if (bold) "bold" else "plain")
    )
}


p <- plot_all_timeline(segs, horizon_years = 10)
print(p)

# If you prefer a different grouping (e.g., Chemo first):
p2 <- plot_all_timeline(
  segs3, horizon_years = 10,
  treatment_order = c("Chemo","IO","Radiation","Hormone","Targeted","Small_Molecule","Ancillary","Other","None")
)
p2


p <- plot_all_timeline(segs3, horizon_years = 10,
                       base_size = 16, title_size = 16,
                       axis_title_size = 14, axis_text_size = 12,
                       legend_title_size = 14, legend_text_size = 12,
                       bold = TRUE)
print(p)


ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Ordered_NSCLC_treatment_timeline.png", p, width = 12, height = 10)

```

```{r}


df_combined<- readRDS("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Medication_NSCLCORIEN.rds")
###### Drug proportion in the dataset


plot_med_mix_clear <- function(df,
                               group_col = "treatment_group",
                               drug_col  = "Medication",
                               top_n     = 8,       # keep top N per group
                               min_prop  = 0.03,    # and anything ≥ 3%
                               wrap      = 16,      # wrap label width
                               base_size = 20) {
  
  stopifnot(all(c(group_col, drug_col) %in% names(df)))
  
  mix <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[group_col]]), !is.na(.data[[drug_col]])) %>%
    transmute(
      grp  = .data[[group_col]],
      drug = str_squish(as.character(.data[[drug_col]]))
    ) %>%
    count(grp, drug, name = "n") %>%
    group_by(grp) %>%
    mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
    arrange(grp, desc(prop), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(keep = row_number() <= top_n | prop >= min_prop,
           drug2 = if_else(keep, drug, "Other")) %>%
    group_by(grp, drug2) %>%                      # collapse long tail into “Other”
    summarise(n = sum(n), prop = sum(prop), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(grp) %>%
    arrange(desc(prop), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(
      pct   = percent(prop, accuracy = 1),
      label = if_else(drug2 == "Other" | prop >= min_prop,
                      paste0(str_wrap(drug2, width = wrap), "\n", pct),
                      "")
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(drug2 = fct_reorder(drug2, prop, .desc = TRUE))
  
  # a pleasant, long palette (recycled as needed)
  cols <- c(
    "#1b9e77","#d95f02","#7570b3","#e7298a","#66a61e","#e6ab02","#a6761d","#666666",
    "#8da0cb","#fc8d62","#66c2a5","#e78ac3","#a6d854","#ffd92f","#e5c494","#b3b3b3"
  )
  cols <- rep(cols, length.out = nlevels(mix$drug2))
  names(cols) <- levels(mix$drug2)
  
  ggplot(mix, aes(x = grp, y = prop, fill = drug2)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.96, colour = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
    geom_text(
      data = subset(mix, label != ""),
      aes(label = label),
      position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
      size = 4.1, lineheight = 0.9, colour = "black"
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cols, name = "Medication (top & ≥ threshold)") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
    labs(
      title = "Medication mix by treatment group",
      x = NULL,
      y = "Share of exposures (within group)"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.key.height = unit(0.35, "cm"),
      legend.key.width  = unit(0.6,  "cm"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
}

# usage:
 p <- plot_med_mix_clear(df_combined, top_n = 8, min_prop = 0.03)
 p

ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/med_mix_clear.svg", p, width = 25, height = 20)

```
